stories.title: Can the Knicks close out the Spurs? We answered ei...
stories.summary: The Knicks have a chance Saturday to win their first NBA title since 1973. Victor Wembanyama and the Spurs, however, are standing in their way.

stories.title: How 34 generations of ancient warrior training sha...
stories.summary: How monks in central China helped turn Victor Wembanyama into the most unstoppable force in basketball.

stories.title: Harden charged with unlawful carrying of weapon
stories.summary: Cavaliers guard James Harden was arrested early Saturday morning in Houston and has been charged with a misdemeanor unlawful carrying of a weapon.

stories.title: Pereira 251 pounds for UFC Freedom 250 at WH
stories.summary: MMA star Alex Pereira tipped the scales at 251 pounds on Saturday, just over 24 hours before he meets Ciryl Gane for the heavyweight title at UFC Freedom 250 at the White House on Sunday night.

stories.title: Police dress as World Cup mascots for drug raid
stories.summary: Police in Peru took a novel approach to clamping down on drug trafficking on Wednesday as they conducted a raid in Lima disguised as the 2026 World Cup mascots.
